proposals.motive: Clarifying the license to avoid legal issues by selecting a single, clear license.
proposals.diff:
--- a/LICENSE
+++ b/LICENSE
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-This project is licensed under the MIT License and ISC License.
+This project is licensed under the MIT License.
 
 See LICENSE file for details.
proposals.apply_error: error: LICENSE: No such file or directory

proposals.motive: Improve maintainability by replacing hardcoded API URLs with environment variables.
Aid user onboarding by providing detailed configuration examples.
proposals.diff:
diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
index 0349a8e..0440788 100644
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -44,6 +44,11 @@ git clone <repo-url> shinobibot && cd shinobibot
 npm install
 
 # 3. Configurar .env
+# Ejemplo detallado de configuración:
+# OPENAI_API_KEY=tu_clave_aqui
+# OPENROUTER_API_KEY=tu_clave_aqui
+# OPENGRAVITY_URL=https://tu_open_gravity_url
+# SHINOBI_API_KEY=tu_clave_shinobi
 cp .env.example .env
 # edita y rellena al menos: OPENAI_API_KEY (o OPENROUTER_API_KEY)
 # y, si usas el cloud, OPENGRAVITY_URL + SHINOBI_API_KEY.
